Class Structures

java.lang.Object
jogo.models.Structures.Structures
Direct Known Subclasses:
City, Forest, Mine, Ranch
public abstract class Structures extends Object
Abstract baseline class for all architectural structures within the game world. Defines the core state machine for lifecycle management, including daily resource consumption, maintenance degradation, production yields, and evolutionary upgrades.
Author:
Fabio Cruz, Tiago Silva

  • Constructor Details

    • Structures

      public Structures(StructuresType structureType, ResourceType production, ResourceType maintenanceMaterial, int expense, int profit, Player owner, ResourceType upgradeMaterial, int level, int scoreValue, int scoreModifier)
      Constructs the structural foundations, binds it to an owner, and injects the initial architectural score value into the player's records.
      Parameters:
      structureType - The specific type categorizing this structure.
      production - The type of resource this building yields.
      maintenanceMaterial - The resource required to sustain daily operational costs.
      expense - The initial maintenance expense value.
      profit - The initial baseline resource production profit value.
      owner - The Player instances who holds title to this building.
      upgradeMaterial - The resource required to process evolutionary upgrades.
      level - The starting developmental level.
      scoreValue - The baseline victory points value assigned by this structure.
      scoreModifier - The active multiplier applied to the baseline score.

  • Method Details

    • generateResource

      public abstract void generateResource(int resourcesModifier)
      Triggers the daily resource acquisition routine, forcing concrete implementations to resolve and append materials directly to the owning player's inventory.
      Parameters:
      resourcesModifier - The current active global production multiplier.

    • consumeResources

      public String consumeResources()
      Deducts the current maintenance fees from the owner's inventory. If the asset balance is deficient, the structure enters a degradation cycle, reducing its developmental level, or faces complete destruction if the level hits zero.
      Returns:
      A formatted status string detailing the success, degradation, or destruction outcome.

    • upgradeStructure

      public abstract boolean upgradeStructure(int scoreModifier) throws InsufficientResourcesException
      Throws:
      InsufficientResourcesException

    • setLevel

      public abstract void setLevel(int level)
